title: Call of election
doc_html:
§1402.  Call of election

The director of the state police service shall issue the call for an election for the classified member of the state police commission on the first Monday after November first of 1990 and every five years thereafter.

Acts 1990, No. 788, §1, eff. Nov. 7, 1990.

§1402.  Call of election
The director of the state police service shall issue the call for an election for the classified member of the state police commission on the first Monday after November first of 1990 and every five years thereafter.
Acts 1990, No. 788, §1, eff. Nov. 7, 1990.
